synopsis:
The story revolves around Zhai Hualong, whose father is a martial arts instructor and grandfather is a traditional Chinese medicine doctor. He learned martial arts from a young age but had never practiced football. Due to his parents' job relocation, he moved from a small town to a big city, where he was ridiculed for being somewhat unsophisticated. His father and grandfather hoped he would pursue martial arts and traditional Chinese medicine, and did not support his pursuit of professional football. 

However, Zhai Hualong fell in love with football, yearned to become a professional player, and longed for recognition from his classmates in the big city. He joined an elite school football team, utilizing his childhood martial arts training to perfectly integrate football with Chinese martial arts, and also gained a deeper understanding of global football. Through each match, he also taught young viewers the importance of perseverance, teamwork, and a spirit of not fearing difficulties.

(Source: Youku, translated)
